title: K1rbeFire
description: Minimalist, low vanilla like fire textures optimized for CPvP. Maximum visibility, zero distractions.
body:
The original fire pack used by **K1rbe**, now available for the public.

![Showcase of the fire in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e793c08674201214e8de9f4c9c2b1a1aa389d8d6.png)

In Crystal PvP, every frame and pixel matters. K1rbeFire replaces the tall, obstructive vanilla fire animation with a sleek, low-profile alternative that stays out of your line of sight.

Key Features:

Low-Fire Overlay: Keeps your vision clear even when you're ignited.

Vanilla-Consistent: Matches the classic Minecraft aesthetic without the clutter.

FPS Friendly: Optimized for high-performance combat scenarios.


If you enjoy using this texturepack, make sure to check out and support K1RBE on his official youtube channel
https://www.youtube.com/@K1RBE
